zh.lifeSummary: 當Ellyn Munning於1552年5月10日出生在英國維爾爾可利福 帕德時，她的父親Humphrey Munning35歲，母親Ellen Ungle31歲。她於1576年7月31日與Thomas Thakere Lanphere在英國素福爾可謝莫結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1634年5月25日在她的家鄉享年82歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維爾爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ellyn Munning于1552年5月10日出生在英国維爾爾可利福 帕德时，她的父亲Humphrey Munning35岁，母亲Ellen Ungle31岁。她于1576年7月31日与Thomas Thakere Lanphere在英国素福爾可謝莫结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1634年5月25日在她的家乡享年82岁，埋葬在英国英格兰維爾爾。

nameMeanings.name: Munning
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: relationship name from the Middle English personal name Munding (Old English * Munding, a derivative of names in Mund- or -mund).

variants.name: Munnings
meanings: English (Suffolk): variant of Munning, with post-medieval excrescent -s. Munning is from the Middle English personal name Munding (Old English Munding, a derivative of names in Mund- or -mund). This form of the surname is the more common one in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Ellyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain origin, possibly from Latin Aemilianus (a derivative of the old Roman family name Aemilius, which is probably from aemulus ‘rival’). Alternatively, it may have a Celtic origin; there are Breton and Irish saints recorded as Aemilianus, which may be a Latinized form of a lost Celtic name.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Ellyn Munning was born on 10 May 1552, in Clyffe Pypard, Wiltshire, England, her father, Humphrey Munning, was 35 and her mother, Ellen Ungle, was 31. She married Thomas Thakere Lanphere on 31 July 1576, in Semer, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 25 May 1634, in her hometown, at the age of 82, and was buried in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ellyn Munning est née le 10 mai 1552, à Clyffe Pypard, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Humphrey Munning, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Ellen Ungle, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Thakere Lanphere le 31 juillet 1576, à Semer, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 25 mai 1634, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterrée à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Mai 1634 im Alter von 82 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Thomas Thakere Lanphere il 31 luglio 1576, nel Semer, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Ellyn Munningが1552年5月10日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアクリフ プイパードで生まれた時，父Humphrey Munningは35歳，母Ellen Ungleは31歳であった。1576年7月31日にイギリススフォルクセマーでThomas Thakere Lanphereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1634年5月25日に故郷で82歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ellyn Munning(이)가 1552년 5월 10일 영국 윌츠히르 클리프 p이파르드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Humphrey Munning(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellen Ungle(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1576년 7월 31일 영국 수폴크 젬어에서 Thomas Thakere Lanphere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1634년 5월 25일 그녀의 고향에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ellyn Munning nasceu em 10 de maio de 1552, em Clyffe Pypard, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Humphrey Munning, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Ellen Ungle, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Thakere Lanphere em 31 de julho de 1576, em Semer, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 25 de maio de 1634, em sua cidade natal, com 82 anos, e foi sepultada em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ellyn Munning родилась 10 мая 1552 г. в местности клифф пипард, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени Humphrey Munning было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen Ungle, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Thakere Lanphere 31 июля 1576 г. в местности семир, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 25 мая 1634 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 82 лет и была похоронена в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Thomas Thakere Lanphere el 31 de julio de 1576, en Semer, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas.
